item.title: Frappuccino
item.description: I love everything about this (except the potato quality but I couldn't find a better one). And if you're gonna be all "aNd ThEN eVeryOnE ClapPeD" I'm gonna silently judge you from alllll the way over here because nothing in that story is stuff that wouldn't happen.

item.title: Images of Note: Service Twink
item.description:
No thoughts, head empty
We also dip these chiken nuggits in sweet chilly sauce.
I'll take one for the team
pls no
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Subscribe so I can get more cocaine.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii (It is always correct to scream at Clint).
Yiheus!
(Dances)
Having to stay away from Eurovision did hurt tbh. It really is gay Christmas.
Gay Nerd.
They're right.
A creature!
I keep my deformed twin in mine :)
HELL YEAH!
@Hox1067 I hope you're still high.
if you replace the word "Woke" with "Degenerate" you start seeing newspaper headlines for what they are actually trying to say.
Oh no
Well this is a thing.
This is why you should lie on the internet about yourself.
owo
Yippee!
I need to do this with Eric.
This is a good view on life to be honest, live to spite God.
In my Stardew game, Harvey is a Catboy!
This implies Scooby Doo hated JFK.
Pee when you see your friends. it's only far.
Yeah this is what I say when people say "hurr durr we don't need human rights law cuz magna carta", it protected the rights of Barons and Lords, not everyone.
I used to fit in a suitcase
ALERT!
D:
Batnipples
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For chaotic Stardew Valley Shenanigans: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: I love watching muppeteers do their thing
item.description: The clapping is my favorite! Posted by Tim O'Brien from the Henson co on his IG. Highly recommend for lots of behind the scenes muppet tomfoolery: https://www.instagram.com/timofbrien/
item.dc:creator: BrainTaffy

item.title: Dystopian memes for super happy fun times.
item.dc:creator: infallibledegenerate

item.title: Sad RHM post. Lost my bestest girl this weekend.
item.description:
Downvote the selfie. I don't care. This was our last walk to the ocean a few months ago.
She loves running and romping SO much
Finny smile
Not begging for food. At all.
Defs not begging
I'll never hold that paw again and it crushes me to think about. I'll miss you forever, my sweet Fi. I never deserved a companion like you for the 11 years we had, and I'll never be able to convey how much you mean to me, for all time. For those who made it this far, go give that sweet aminal of yours a hug and some loves. They've more than earned it.
item.dc:creator: thesavagery

item.title: take care of yourself
item.description: even if there are days when the only success is getting out of bed. you can, i believe in you.

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1278
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/u7gkSNN Wholesome Post 1277 https://imgur.com/gallery/PUAlS14 Wholesome Post 1276 https://imgur.com/gallery/N6scbuS Wholesome Post 1275 https://imgur.com/gallery/sc2CZZq Wholesome Post 1274 https://imgur.com/gallery/cmu0zgg Wholesome Post 1273 https://imgur.com/gallery/hGuSUJo Wholesome Post 1272 https://imgur.com/gallery/IdTO2QZ Wholesome Post 1271
I include a fundraiser link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.modestneeds.org/features/ledger/viewapp.asp?source=BrowseRequest&mode=upd&rp=l&id=630031
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
item.dc:creator: ryanjoseph666

item.title: Just realized I'm trans dump
item.description:
Oh boy here we go.
I have no idea what the next steps are.
Or any idea how to express myself in an environment where coming out might be dangerous.
I've spent a lot of time and energy trying to justify this to myself, that it's not some sort of something else.
As well as coming to terms with how it might impact others' opinions of me, for I am not a brave sort.
So for a lack of anything better I can do right now, have some memes; some fresh, most stale and stolen.
Thanks for being a cooler than usual void for me to shout into.
I am a hammer girl.
My cat died last week, so I have no new cat picture for the tax, but perhaps when I feel better I will post some older ones of my poor floofer. Between everything going on, from outstanding bills to dangerous world news to aurora borealis and now a crippling bout of self realization, I'm a bit overwhelmed at the moment. I would appreciate any cute things you have in stock. Thanks, imgur, for being the cooler void. MOST VIRAL EDIT: Thanks for being so understanding, all. Everyone's been so nice and supportive so far, and it really is making me feel nice and bubbly inside. I hope everyone has a wonderful day today.
item.dc:creator: thunderknight64
